meaning: adj.亲近的,亲密的,近,(车,马等)左侧的,吝啬的adv.(时间,空间方面)近,不远 prep.在...近旁,近...v.接近,走近
examples: Is there a stationer's near here?
Is there a gents near here?
We only ask that no denim is brought into the stadium, nor anywhere near it.
Of about 9, 700 near-Earth asteroids discovered so far, about 5, 200 are thought to be Apollos.
